## MODIFIED Requirements

### Requirement: Claude Code MCP delegation generated by mkClientTooling
When a service has `capabilities.mcp` and a client enables `claude-code.mcp.enabled`, `mkClientTooling` SHALL generate `programs.claude-code.mcpServers.${clientName}` with config derived from `capabilities.mcp`. Profile-specific MCP SHALL also be generated when `claude-code.profiles.${profile}.mcp.enabled = true`.

#### Scenario: Default profile MCP
- **WHEN** a client enables `claude-code.mcp.enabled = true`
- **THEN** `programs.claude-code.mcpServers.${clientName}` SHALL be set

#### Scenario: Profile-specific MCP
- **WHEN** a client enables `claude-code.profiles.business.mcp.enabled = true`
- **THEN** `programs.claude-code.profiles.business.mcpServers.${clientName}` SHALL be set

### Requirement: Claude Code skill delegation generated by mkClientTooling
When a service has `capabilities.skill` and a client enables `claude-code.skill.enabled`, `mkClientTooling` SHALL generate `programs.claude-code.skills.${clientName}` with the substituted skill content. This SHALL NOT be generated when `agent-skills.enabled = true` (agent-skills takes precedence for skill distribution).

#### Scenario: Skill via claude-code when agent-skills disabled
- **WHEN** `claude-code.skill.enabled = true` and `agent-skills.enabled = false`
- **THEN** `programs.claude-code.skills.${clientName}` SHALL contain the skill content

#### Scenario: Skill via agent-skills takes precedence
- **WHEN** both `claude-code.skill.enabled = true` and `agent-skills.enabled = true`
- **THEN** `programs.claude-code.skills.${clientName}` SHALL NOT be set (agent-skills handles distribution)
